rootCause: completionist/reminder and completionist/catalog were simultaneously available after completionist/v2 in live content, which allowed progression states where players advanced reminder-side work before catalog and then could not finish catalog without implicit ordering knowledge.
resolution: Made completionist/reminder explicitly depend on both completionist/catalog and completionist/polish, updated the completionist skills doc dependency map, and tightened quest completable regression coverage to assert this dependency contract so similar non-linear lockouts are caught in CI.
